title: Thickness Property
description: Defines the thickness (in pixels) of the ring used for the Polar object.
notes:
It is important to remember that the Polar Search object is used to process images that are circular in nature.  The Thickness property defines the thickness of the circular ring which is used to define the Search Window for the Polar Search.

In many cases the Thickness property does not need to be very large for a successful search.  Since the Thickness property defines the search window size for the Polar object, keeping the Thickness small results in faster Polar search times.

See Also: Thickness Property
